name: Power Blues
description: The Power Blues are special Skylanders that appeared in Skylanders: SuperChargers. These Skylanders were created in response to the fans who are diagnosed with autism and help spread awareness.
biography: The Power Blues are special Skylanders that appeared in Skylanders: SuperChargers. These Skylanders were created in response to the fans who are diagnosed with autism and help spread awareness. In addition to the partnership between Activision and Autism Speaks, Splat, Double Dare Trigger Happy and their respective vehicles are colored blue and white to reflect Autism Speaks' official colors.

story.content: The Power Blues are special Skylanders that appeared in Skylanders: SuperChargers. These Skylanders were created in response to the fans who are diagnosed with autism and help spread awareness. In addition to the partnership between Activision and Autism Speaks, Splat, Double Dare Trigger Happy and their respective vehicles are colored blue and white to reflect Autism Speaks' official colors.

trivia: Power Blue Splat and Power Blue Trigger Happy's Rift Engine pedestals are white while their element icons and bottom elemental parts are blue.
A Power Blue variant of Ember was planned for Skylanders: Imaginators but was scrapped.
gameplay: These variants play identically to their standard versions in terms of mechanics and move sets, but they are visually distinct with their blue-and-white color schemes in both the physical world and the digital game. In Skylanders: SuperChargers, Power Blue Splat and Power Blue Trigger Happy appear in-game with their unique blue and white skins.
